steps.title: Find the chapter 17 quote
steps.content: The student's goal is to provide a quotation from chapter 17. The notes identify chapter 17 as a discussion of skeptics' takes on nostalgia and give the quotation about the poethics of nostalgia.

steps.title: Reject choices without the quote
steps.content: A refers to chapter 17's topic but includes no quotation. B describes The Future of Nostalgia generally and includes no chapter 17 quote. D discusses chapter 14, not chapter 17, and also lacks a quotation. The answer is C.
